children.heading: Fund
children.label: 1 Fund
children.text: The term “Fund” means the Collaborative Forest Landscape Restoration Fund established by .section 7303(f) of this title

children.heading: Program
children.label: 2 Program
children.text: The term “program” means the Collaborative Forest Landscape Restoration Program established under .section 7303(a) of this title

children.heading: Proposal
children.label: 3 Proposal
children.text: The term “proposal” means a collaborative forest landscape restoration proposal described in .section 7303(b) of this title

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 4 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of Agriculture, acting through the Chief of the Forest Service.

children.heading: Strategy
children.label: 5 Strategy
children.text: The term “strategy” means a landscape restoration strategy described in .section 7303(b)(1) of this title
